title: filago germanica
intro: Filago germanica, also known as German false flax or cornflax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Filago germanica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting skin health. Filago germanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
